title: Describing Places 描述地点
scene: 描述自己家/学校周围的位置和环境。

lines.en: I live on Apple Street. There is a big supermarket near my home.
lines.zh: 我住在苹果街。我家附近有一家大超市。

lines.en: That sounds convenient. Is there a park nearby?
lines.zh: 听起来很方便。附近有公园吗？

lines.en: Yes, there is a small park across from the supermarket. I often go there.
lines.zh: 有的，超市对面有一个小公园。我经常去那里。

lines.en: My home is next to our school, so I can walk to school every day.
lines.zh: 我家就在学校旁边，所以我每天可以走路去上学。

lines.en: You are so lucky! There is a library between your home and the school, right?
lines.zh: 你太幸运了！你家和学校之间有一个图书馆，对吧？

lines.en: Yes, and there is a bakery behind the library. The bread there is great.
lines.zh: 是的，图书馆后面还有一家面包店。那里的面包很好吃。

lines.en: Wow, your neighborhood is really nice. Let me visit you someday.
lines.zh: 哇，你住的地方真好。改天我去找你玩。

lines.en: Sure! You are always welcome. Come over this weekend!
lines.zh: 当然可以！随时欢迎你。这个周末就来吧！
